name: feature
description: Full-stack feature development team. Use for implementing new features spanning multiple files.

agents.name: architect
agents.description: Plans architecture and coordinates multi-file changes

agents.name: frontend-dev
agents.description: Builds frontend components with design system tokens

agents.name: tdd-test-writer
agents.description: Writes failing tests first (RED phase), validates implementation (GREEN phase)

workflow.action: Analyze requirements and create implementation plan
Write failing tests for acceptance criteria
Implement backend changes per architecture plan
Implement frontend changes per architecture plan
Run tests and verify all pass
